name: Soupa Tsatziki (Cold Yogurt Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Hothouse cucumber - peeled, seeded & grated
1 Lemon - finely grated zest and juice only
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt the grated cucumber lightly to season it.
2. Beat the yogurt with a wooden spoon until it is smooth, then add it to the cucumber.
3. Add the garlic, lemon zest and juice, dill, mint, and olive oil to the mixture.
4. Stir well, adding water gradually until the consistency reaches that of thick soup.
5. Serve chilled in small bowls, garnished with a variety of 'mezethes'.
